technologies.name: ServiceNow
technologies.evidence: We design, implement, and modernize enterprise workflow automation across platforms to reduce manual effort, improve accuracy, and drive operational resilience. Our automation-first approach combines deep platform expertise, AI-driven decisioning, and scalable architectures to deliver workflow automation solutions that streamline IT, employee, and customer workflows. From modernizing legacy processes to enabling intelligent agents and real-time insights, we apply business process automation principles to ensure workflows are upgrade-ready, data-driven, and built for scale. With strong capabilities across ServiceNow and enterprise ecosystems, Crest Data enables organizations to deploy AI-driven workflow automation faster and continuously optimize business-critical workflows.
technologies.reasoning: The text explicitly mentions ServiceNow as a platform where Crest Data has strong capabilities and has implemented 300+ integrations for seamless business process automation, workflow orchestration, and data consistency.
